creator: grahamperrin@freebsd.org
text:
<https://cgit.freebsd.org/ports/tree/graphics/drm-devel-kmod/pkg-descr>, 
<https://cgit.freebsd.org/ports/tree/graphics/drm-current-kmod/pkg-descr> and 
<https://cgit.freebsd.org/ports/tree/graphics/drm-fbsd13-kmod/pkg-descr> refer to: 

    https://github.com/freebsd/drm-kmod


<https://cgit.freebsd.org/ports/tree/graphics/drm-kmod/pkg-descr?id=2bcb49de3e64e9086077c1ee4090b60ae7ff049d#n13> referred to: 

    https://github.com/FreeBSDDesktop/kms-drm

The current graphics/drm-kmod/pkg-descr is probably outdated, should refer to: 

    https://github.com/freebsd/drm-kmod

Thanks
